'''Macander Heavy Ores''' was the largest [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Aleron]], located within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
